title: Organize PDF Pages — Reorder & Delete Offline
h1: Reorder, Delete, or Duplicate PDF Pages Locally
description: Drag and drop to rearrange, remove, or duplicate PDF pages entirely in your browser. No upload. Great for users in Athens.

sections.title: Why Organize PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Reorganizing page structure is an editing operation. Your internal document should stay internal during editing.

steps.title: Open PDF
steps.description: Load the PDF you want to reorganize.

steps.title: Drag to Reorder
steps.description: Drag page thumbnails to the desired position.

sections.title: Document Organization for Athens Teams
sections.content: Teams in Athens reorganize proposal and report PDFs without uploading to any cloud service.

sections.title: Page Structure Is Private Business
sections.content: Reordering internal reports and proposals with zero data leaving your browser.

sections.title: Reorganize Any PDF in Seconds
sections.content: Reorder pages in a 500-page document through a smooth drag-and-drop interface with zero upload.

faqs.a: Yes, click the delete icon on any page thumbnail.
Yes, duplicate individual pages with one click.
Yes, per-page rotation is available in the organizer.
No limit! Organize documents of any size.
